🚀 We’re Hiring: AI Solutions Architect (Contract | Remote)

Are you passionate about designing intelligent, scalable, and future-ready enterprise solutions? Join us at Yaza as an AI Solutions Architect and play a key role in shaping AI-driven transformation across enterprise ecosystems.

🔹 Role Overview
We’re looking for a seasoned professional to lead the governance, design, and delivery of AI-powered and automation solutions across CRM, ERP, and iPaaS platforms. You’ll work at the intersection of architecture, AI innovation, and enterprise integration.

🔹 Employment Type: Contractual
🌍 Work Mode: Remote

🔹 Key Responsibilities
• Architect and deliver AI-driven solutions across enterprise platforms
• Design scalable integrations using REST/GraphQL APIs, event streaming, ETL/ELT, and webhooks
• Lead AI/ML initiatives including LLM workflows, agentic AI systems, predictive analytics, or document processing
• Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business needs into robust technical architectures
• Ensure alignment with enterprise technology operating models and governance standards

🔹 Required Skills & Experience
✔️ 10+ years in enterprise architecture, system integration, or related fields
✔️ Experience across:

* CRM: Salesforce, HubSpot, Dynamics 365
* ERP: SAP S/4HANA, Oracle, NetSuite
* iPaaS: MuleSoft, Boomi, Workato, Azure Integration Services
  ✔️ Hands-on experience deploying AI/ML solutions in production environments
  ✔️ Strong understanding of modern integration patterns
  ✔️ Excellent communication with both technical and business stakeholders

🔹 Preferred Qualifications
✨ Experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, or AI fine-tuning
✨ Knowledge of AI governance frameworks (NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act)
✨ Cloud certifications (AWS, Azure, GCP)
✨ Experience in regulated industries (Finance, Healthcare, Manufacturing)

📩 Interested candidates can apply by sending their resume to Ritika@yaza.com.au

🚀 Hiring: AIML Engineer – Molecular Dynamics (Remote)
We are looking for a highly skilled AIML Engineer with hands-on experience in Molecular Dynamics to join our team. This is a unique opportunity to work at the intersection of Machine Learning, Data Engineering, and Scientific Computing, contributing to cutting-edge solutions in a data-driven environment.


📍 Location-Remote (India)
⏰ Shift-Day Shift
💼 Experience-4 – 7 Years
🧑‍💻 Employment Type-Contract to Hire


🔍 Role Overview
As an AIML Engineer, you will be responsible for building and deploying machine learning models, designing data pipelines, and working with molecular simulation data to drive meaningful insights. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate intelligent solutions into business applications.


🛠️ Key Responsibilities
🔹 Data Engineering
Write complex SQL queries to extract, transform, and load (ETL) data from relational databases
Build and maintain scalable data pipelines for ML workflows
🔹 Machine Learning Development
Develop and fine-tune ML models (classification, regression, clustering)
Work with libraries such as Scikit-learn, XGBoost
🔹 Pipeline Automation
Design automated workflows for model training, evaluation, and retraining
Ensure continuous performance optimization of models
🔹 Feature Engineering
Analyze raw datasets and create meaningful features to improve model accuracy
🔹 Collaboration
Work closely with Data Engineers, Product Managers, and domain experts
Translate business requirements into technical solutions


🧪 Must-Have Skills
Strong proficiency in Python and SQL
Hands-on experience in Molecular Dynamics / Molecular Simulation
Experience with ML frameworks (Scikit-learn, XGBoost, etc.)
Good understanding of data pipelines and ETL processes


⭐ Good-to-Have Skills
Experience with Molecular Dynamics tools like GROMACS, LAMMPS, NAMD, or AMBER
Knowledge of computational chemistry / bioinformatics
Exposure to cloud platforms or large-scale data processing
Experience in scientific data analysis


🧠 What We’re Looking For
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
Ability to work independently in a remote setup
Good communication and collaboration skills
Passion for applying AI/ML in scientific domains


🎯 Why Join Us?
Work on cutting-edge AI + scientific computing problems
Opportunity to collaborate with cross-functional global teams
Flexible remote work environment


👉 If you’re excited about combining Machine Learning with Molecular Dynamics, we’d love to hear from you!
📩 Interested candidates (immediate joiners / serving notice) can share their updated resume along with ID proof at:
👉 deepika.sahu@teamlease.com

IT Recruiter at Kanary Staffing

[EMAILS FOUND: deepika.sahu@teamlease.com]

[PHONE NUMBERS FOUND: 7444314772, 17762976000, 17345265726, 7444314505, 15695062629, 1439386116, 17560558752, 1776297600, 15695062628]

Urgent Hiring | AI Engineer / AI Consultant
📍 Location: Ahmedabad / Remote
 💼 Experience: 5–10 Years
 🏭 Industry: Open (Preferred: Pharma / Life Sciences / Tech)

 📌 Role Type: Full-time / Contract

🔍 Role Overview
We are seeking a highly skilled AI Engineer / AI Consultant to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI-driven solutions. This role requires strong expertise in Machine Learning, Generative AI, and MLOps, along with the ability to translate business requirements into intelligent systems.

🚀 Key Responsibilities
Design and build AI/ML and Generative AI solutions for business use cases
Work with stakeholders to identify and define AI opportunities
Develop NLP, LLM-based, or predictive models
Implement RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) pipelines
Build and optimize data pipelines for model training & inference
Deploy models using MLOps best practices (CI/CD, monitoring, scaling)
Integrate AI solutions with enterprise systems via APIs
Ensure model performance, accuracy, and governance
Collaborate with Data Engineering, DevOps, and Product teams
Document architecture, workflows, and technical solutions

🧠 Core Skills Required
Strong programming in Python (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn)
Experience with Machine Learning & Deep Learning frameworks (TensorFlow / PyTorch)
Hands-on experience in Generative AI (LLMs, GPT, Transformers)
Knowledge of Prompt Engineering & RAG architectures
Experience with LangChain / LlamaIndex / Hugging Face
Understanding of vector databases (FAISS, Pinecone, Weaviate)
Strong foundation in statistics, algorithms, and data structures

Human Resources Manager | Hiring Multiple Roles

🚀 We Are Hiring Freelancers | Multiple Roles
At Nextloop Technologies, we are expanding our project teams and looking for talented freelancers to join us on exciting engagements with global clients. If you’re passionate about IT consulting and want to work on high-impact projects, explore our current openings below:

Nextloop Technologies is a leading provider of digital transformation services, specializing in Staff augmentation, customs of software developers and AI and Blockchain solutions,  enterprise software development, SAP consulting, cloud solutions, data analytics. We partner with global enterprises to deliver innovative and scalable solutions.

Requirements:
We are seeking a highly skilled Data Architect - AEP  to join our project team at Nextloop Technologies. The freelancer will be responsible for delivering high- quality solutions aligned with client need.

Skill- Set Required:
•  Strong expertise in Data Modeling
•  Hands-on experience with ETL Pipelines
•  Familiarity with Advanced SQL
• Additional knowledge of Big Data Technologies
 
📍Location: Hybrid – Bengaluru , Bangalore , Pune , Mumbai , Noida , Gurgaon , Chennai , Hyderabad

Tenure for project: Project Duration – 6 months Contract
Extensions possible based on performance and project needs.

Experience:
8–10 years of relevant professional experience in Data Engineering/Data Architecture and Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) with proven track record of successful project delivery.

Required:
•  Strong expertise in Data Modeling and Customer Data Architecture
•  Hands-on experience with ETL Pipelines, Data Transformation, and Large-scale Data Processing
•  Familiarity with Advanced SQL, Data Warehousing, and Big Data Technologies
• Additional knowledge of Adobe Experience Platform (AEP) and Customer 360° Data Solutions
 
Why Join Us?
Collaborate on prestigious projects with global enterprises.
Flexible freelance opportunities across diverse technologies.
Exposure to cutting-edge IT solutions and digital transformation.
Competitive compensation and professional growth.

📩 How to Apply :
Send your updated resume to hr@nextlooptechnologies.com with the subject line Application –Data Architect - AEP | Nextloop Technologies.

Simplifying AI for Business & Personal Growth | MEd | Helping Leaders Scale through Strategic Learning | DM for Partnerships 📩
